title: Touji in Kaworu senario NGE 2 PS2 PSP
display_title: Touji in Kaworu senario NGE 2 PS2 PSP
wikitext:
[]: Touji in Kaworu senario. (NGE 2 PS2/PSP)             Quote Post by mauricep3 » Sun Mar 11, 2007 11:13 pm This for those who played NGE 2 PS2/PSP. (because I don't think anybody else can answer this.) When I started playing as Kaworu(mainly for Eva 04) I listened to the intro at the beganing. I heard them mentioning Shinji and Touji. Shinji I can understand, but what does Touji have to do with Kaworu. They never met in the series, (unless you've read Angelic Days manga) Is it because of their evas 03 and 04? What's the connection?

[]: Re: Touji in Kaworu senario. (NGE 2 PS2/PSP)             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Mar 12, 2007 2:20 pm mauricep3 wrote: Shinji I can understand, but what does Touji have to do with Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Mar 12, 2007 10:42 pm Touji was reincarnated as a cat that Kaworu strangled. It's there in the anime, too; they just didn't show it.

[]:             Quote Post by Fearthebait » Mon Mar 12, 2007 11:44 pm NAveryW wrote: Touji was reincarnated as a cat that Kaworu strangled. It's there in the anime, too; they just didn't show it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 12, 2007 11:58 pm Fearthebait wrote: WOAH WOAH WOAH, where does anything support this?

[]:             Quote Post by Fearthebait » Tue Mar 13, 2007 12:08 am I guess i should feel really stupid now?

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Mar 13, 2007 7:35 am Reichu wrote: Should I shoot him for this seemingly shameless display of incredulity, BobBQ, or should you?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Mar 13, 2007 7:46 am OK, distasteful as it may be, I think the only thing that could get this thread back on topic and fully answer mauricep3's question would be to say that T/K shipping, while mercifully an extreme rarity, is unlikely to be a nonexistant entity in online Eva circles.

[]:             Quote Post by Lleonard Pler » Tue Mar 13, 2007 6:05 pm Scenarios 02-18 of this game don't necessarily stick to the series plot. Kaworu and Touji may meet and interact, and even fight together.

[]:             Quote Post by mauricep3 » Tue Apr 24, 2007 10:33 am I understand the that those two scenerios has nothing to do with each other but I just want to know what they were saying. Because obviosely I don't know Japannesse :roll:

[]: Re: Touji in Kaworu senario. (NGE 2 PS2/PSP)             Quote Post by Big Panda » Tue Apr 24, 2007 9:46 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: mauricep3 wrote: Shinji I can understand, but what does Touji have to do with Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Thu Apr 26, 2007 1:28 pm NAveryW wrote: Touji was reincarnated as a cat that Kaworu strangled. It's there in the anime, too; they just didn't show it.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Fri Apr 27, 2007 9:59 pm Reichu wrote: Fearthebait wrote: WOAH WOAH WOAH, where does anything support this?
